summary: REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear implemented via adding a `glyph` field + `getTokenGlyph` helper in `tokens.ts` and rendering glyphs in `TokensSection.tsx`. REQ-3 is partially evidenced: receive panel heading uses glyph, and send panel success toast uses glyph, but the primary action button label change cannot be confirmed due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: `frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenSendPanel.tsx` includes the glyph alongside the token ticker in the primary action button label.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff for `TokenSendPanel.tsx` is truncated at the Button definition (`className="w-...`), so there is no visible evidence that the button text/label includes `{glyph}` and `{tokenSymbol}` as required.

hallucinated_features.description: Added expected-mainnet ledger canister ID mapping and a self-check function (`EXPECTED_MAINNET_LEDGER_IDS`, `TokenLedgerCheck`, `checkTokenLedgerConfiguration`) beyond the requested glyph/accessor changes.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asks to add token symbol glyphs and display them in the UI; it does not request ledger ID verification utilities or diagnostics-oriented functions/mappings.
